name: genie
description: Genie — Compound Engineering Workflow + Everything Claude Code Tools

interface.shortDescription: Compound Engineering workflow — brainstorm, plan, TDD, review, commit.
interface.longDescription: Genie is a Compound Engineering plugin that guides development from idea to commit. Brainstorm requirements one question at a time, generate implementation plans with guardrails, write failing tests first (TDD), implement against the plan, run multi-persona code review, and capture learnings — all through a consistent /genie:* command loop.
